name: claude-workspace-plugins
description: Production-tested Claude Code plugins for modern development workflows

plugins.name: DEV-BE-PYTHON
plugins.description: Python/FastAPI Clean Architecture backend development guidelines with domain entities, use cases, and repository patterns.

plugins.name: DEV-BE-GO
plugins.description: Go/Chi Clean Architecture backend development guidelines with domain entities, services, and repository patterns (sqlc + pgx). Includes DDD patterns, CQRS guidance, slog observability, and gRPC support.

plugins.name: DEV-FE
plugins.description: React/TypeScript/Tanstack Query/Tanstack Router frontend development guidelines. Includes dev-docs-fe command for creating comprehensive technical requirement specifications.

plugins.name: DEV-ESSENTIALS
plugins.description: Development essentials with specialized agents (including documentation-architect with Maps of Content navigation), git workflow, lateral thinking, and expert consultation skills, code review and verification commands, backend TRS documentation, and 8 development quality hooks

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: Skill development tools, wiki maintenance with knowledge pipeline (ingest, query, lint, reduce, reflect, reweave), deep-research investigation pipeline, and web research agent for enhanced development workflow

plugins.name: learning-coach
plugins.description: Personal learning and system design coach with 2 skills: learning_methods (Feynman Technique, Socratic tutoring, diagnostic learning plans grounded in cognitive science — System 2 engagement, ZPD, retrieval practice) and technical_coach (SWE system design with 35 LLD & HLD problems, ML system design with 9-step framework and 10 MLE interview problems).

plugins.name: financial-coach
plugins.description: Personal financial coach with company valuation analysis and YouTube video analysis skills. Includes multi-phase investment framework with moat assessment, sector-specific valuation metrics, reverse DCF reality checks, and comprehensive video transcript analysis.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous ML research plugin covering Karpathy's experiment loops, SkyPilot parallel GPU scaling, the AI Scientist's multi-phase research pipeline with tree search, manuscript generation, automated peer review, and queue-based orchestration with fresh context per phase.
